finding_results.notes: All explicit Thursday appointment references were normalized to 10:40 (clinic scheduling, relay message, spoken confirmation, and closing internal repeat), removing prior 12:40 contradictions at the chapter seam.

The overnight section now plays in scene time with multiple request-pressure-compliance beats (tablet demand, water demand, chamber pot coercion tied to Arthur as witness risk) and lands immediate consequence in Noreen's body and decision-state.
Both intimidation beats were converted from abstract labels to observable threat cues plus immediate somatic response from Noreen.

The close now includes a durable tactical counter-move: Noreen secures an external van pickup via Bhatti/Dev and preserves a separate Keane-authored appointment card hidden from Peter while he controls a decoy slip. The leverage remains active in the final lines.
Control pressure is now dramatized through concrete actions (phone seizure/rerouting, purse/coin rationing, fare allocation constraints) while retaining only one abstract order maxim line.

summary: All packet findings were resolved in chapter 11 with continuity-corrected appointment timing, stronger embodied coercion consequences, concrete menace signals, and an ending leverage shift that materially limits Peter's control while preserving chapter-to-chapter continuity.
